title: Urth 77mm 4-in-1 Lens Filter Kit (Plus+) — UV, CPL, Neutral Density ND8, ND1000, Multi-Coated Optical Glass, Ultra-Slim Camera Lens Filters
features: 4-IN-1 FILTER KIT | Featuring a UV Plus+, CPL Plus+, ND8 Plus+ (3 Stop), and an ND1000 Plus+ (10 Stop), all the essential creative tools for outdoor photography.
CREATIVE OPTIONS | Use the UV Plus+ to increase clarity, CPL Plus+ to remove reflections and increase contrast, the ND8 Plus+ & ND1000 Plus + to slow shutters and widen apertures.
PRO GLASS | This pro-range filter kits features up to 30-layer nano-coated German SCHOTT glass, ensuring exceptional light control and transmission.
PRECISION ENGINEERING | The ultra-slim rim design of these camera lens filters optimize optics and prevent vignetting.
LIFETIME QUALITY | Made from tough magnalium, Urth Lens Filter Kits offer lasting resilience. Backed for life.
description: Product Description Previous page Advanced nano coating technology Superior light transmittance & optics Anti-scratch protection Scratch resistant nano coating Water and dust repellent Protect your lens from dust, debris, oil, smudges & water Next page 1 Pro nano coating 2 Anti-scratch glass 3 Elemental durability Previous page Next page 1 Exposure control 2 Polarized light blocker 3 HD quality Previous page Stack, cap & go Comes with durable lens filter caps for compact protection while on the go High precision design CNC precision machining for an ultra slim, double threaded rim & non slip grip Next page 1 Protective kit 2 Premium details Previous page Certified B Corporation Urth is committed to accountability, transparency & continuous improvement Made for life Urth products are guaranteed for life, as longevity is key to sustainability Every purchase plants 1 tree Each Urth product funds regeneration projects for a 10x greater positive impact Next page 1 B Corp Certified 2 Lifetime guaranteed 3 Tree planting Essentials Filter Kit Plus+ Magnetic Essentials Kit Plus+ Nature Filter Kit Plus+ Filters included UV Plus+, CPL Plus+, ND8 Plus+, ND1000 Plus+ Filters included Magnetic UV Plus+, Magnetic CPL Plus+, Magnetic ND8 Plus+, Magnetic ND1000 Plus+ Filters included UV Plus+, CPL Plus+, ND64 Plus+, Soft Graduated ND8 Plus+ Filter effects Lens protection, cut UV haze, reflections, block light, balance exposure Filter effects Lens protection, cut UV haze, reflections, block light, balance exposure Filter effects Lens protection, cut UV haze, reflections, block light, balance contrast light Glass grade German SCHOTT B270 Glass grade German SCHOTT B270 Glass grade German SCHOTT B270 Mount Double-threaded, screw-on mount Mount Magnetic and screw-on mount Mount Double-threaded, screw-on mount 1. How can I determine the right filter size for my camera lens? Find your lens filter size (in mm) printed near the Ø symbol on the lens or back of the lens cap. You can also find your filter size on your lens cap, or search online with your lens model, e.g., "Canon EF 24mm f1.4L USM II filter size" for 77mm. 2. What's the difference between the Urth and Urth Plus+ ranges? Urth has two ranges: Urth (standard) with Japanese AGC glass and an 8-layer nano-coating, and Urth Plus+ (professional) with German SCHOTT glass and a 20-layer nano-coating (30 layers for UV Plus+). 3. Can I stack multiple filters? Yes, our filters are double-threaded for stacking. For best image quality, use only one filter at a time as stacking can cause vignetting. Avoid stacking more than two filters. 4. Why buy a filter kit? Filter kits allow you to capture a range of creative effects and can help you better adapt to extreme shooting conditions. Our filter kits also come with top and bottom lens caps for compact storage and protection while your filters are in your bag. 5. What's a filter kit? A filter kit is a collection of lens filters designed to give more control in different conditions. In addition to offering better value, Urth filter kits come with top and bottom lens caps for space-saving, safe and easy storage in your kit.
